name: Walnut Almond Biscotti
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Sift together flour, baking soda, baking powder, salt, and pepper into a bowl.
3. In a large bowl, cream butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
4. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
5. Stir in orange zest, lemon zest, vanilla extract, and almond extract.
6. Gradually fold the sifted dry ingredients into the batter, being careful not to overmix.
7. Shape the dough into a flattish log approximately 3 inches wide and long enough to fit on your baking sheet. If needed, make two logs.
8. Place the logs on a greased cookie sheet and bake for about 20 minutes.
9. Remove from the oven and let cool completely.
10. Using a serrated bread knife, cut the log(s) into 3/4-inch wide pieces.
11. Arrange the cookies cut side down on a greased baking sheet.
12. Bake again at 350°F until golden brown, about 15 minutes.
13. Remove from the oven and let cool completely.
14. Store in tins. Makes 24 cookies.
